lime: From mg/L for brine concentration. Estimates from https://www.accio.com/plp/cost-of-bulk-hydrated-lime, https://www.made-in-china.com/products-search/hot-china-products/Lime_Chemical_Price.html
scrub_makeup: Dominated by price of weak salt (e.g. NaCl)
soda_ash: From mg/L for brine concentration. Prices have varied quite a bit, but estimate to be about ~$USD300/ton https://tradingeconomics.com/commodity/soda-ash
dispersant: Heavily dependent on type of dispersant & specific formulation, run sensitivity analysis
neutralizing_agent: Mix of NaOH and lime for impurity removal. Depends on pH balance / circuit

Description: From GREET or ecoInvent (3.8, via Roy et al. 2024) unless colored
